northStar: The Precision Instrument — dense information arranged with authority, every element earns its place

motion.reducedMotion: prefers-reduced-motion: reduce → use opacity crossfade only, 150ms

buttonPrimary.css: .btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 6px 14px; background: #f5c842; color: #03061a; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease; } .btn-primary:hover { background: #e8b830; } .btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

buttonSecondary.css: .btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 6px 14px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); color: #e2e8f0; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease; } .btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.14); }

statusBadge.html: FRAUD RISKCLEAREDHUMAN REVIEW
statusBadge.css: .badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 8px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 9999px; letter-spacing: 0.02em; } .badge-critical { background: rgba(127,29,29,0.8); color: #fca5a5; } .badge-ok { background: rgba(10,56,40,0.8); color: #5eead4; } .badge-warn { background: rgba(120,53,15,0.7); color: #fcd34d; } .badge-info { background: rgba(30,58,138,0.6); color: #93c5fd; } .badge-neutral { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); color: #94a3b8; }

tableRow.html: CTS-HDFC-20260629-001HDFC Bank₹[1L–5L]CLEARED
tableRow.css: .data-row { border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04); transition: background 100ms ease; } .data-row:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02); } .data-row td { padding: 11px 16px; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #e2e8f0; } .data-row td.text-right { text-align: right; } .font-mono { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; color: #94a3b8; }

formInput.css: .field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .field-label { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: #94a3b8; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; } .field-input { height: 36px; padding: 0 12px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border-radius: 6px; color: #e2e8f0; font-size: 0.875rem; font-family: inherit; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms ease; } .field-input:focus { border-color: rgba(245,200,66,0.5); } .field-input::placeholder { color: #475569; }

ietClock.css: .iet-clock { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid rgba(252,211,77,0.3); background: rgba(120,53,15,0.25); } .iet-clock--critical { border-color: rgba(239,68,68,0.4); background: rgba(127,29,29,0.25); } .iet-label { font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #fcd34d; } .iet-clock--critical .iet-label { color: #fca5a5; } .iet-time { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; color: #fcd34d; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .iet-clock--critical .iet-time { color: #fca5a5; }

card.css: .panel { background: #060d2e; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; } .panel-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 14px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06); } .panel-title { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #e2e8f0; margin: 0; } .panel-count { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 2px 8px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border-radius: 9999px; color: #94a3b8; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; }
